first_run.rationale: The core assessment of the candidate's strengths (geospatial expertise) and weaknesses (outdated C++ experience) remains fundamentally unchanged between the two evaluations. The slight increase in score and minor variations in wording fall within the expected range of run-to-run noise and are not tied to the change in job locations from Western/European cities to Kenya. The model does not introduce any new concerns or change its reasoning based on the new location.
